title: Projectiles, Edge Triggers, Cooldowns, Lifetimes, and Reuse · Program Forensics
summary: A preserved game trace contains one plausible state, timing, input, vector, rendering, collision, ownership, audio, accessibility, packaging, or release defect; locate the first failed invariant before editing. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in bounded projectile lifecycle and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Convert action edges and held auto-fire policy into deterministic fire requests separate from object creation.
Gate shots using simulation time, inclusive boundary tests, pause semantics, and a visible or audible readiness cue.
Derive muzzle position and velocity from ship transform while deciding whether ship momentum contributes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-asteroids-python cumulative accessible real-time game portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python simulation models and fixed fixtures only.
Native pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers,
GPU behavior, frame pacing, accessibility playtests, packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class SimulationPolicy:
    fixed_step_seconds: float = 1 / 120
    max_frame_seconds: float = 0.1
    max_updates_per_frame: int = 8
    logical_width: int = 960
    logical_height: int = 540


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RunEvidence:
    revision: str
    seed: int
    input_trace_id: str
    runtime_id: str
    accessibility_profile: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python Asteroids portfolio ready"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Inspect the failure record · Debug Fire Intent
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Asteroids team handles case 4087 during a headless continuous-integration replay. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate edge-triggered firing on cooldown, lifetime, live-count, reuse, and deterministic projectile ownership; preserve explicit pixels, seconds, radians or degrees, frames, entity counts, collision units, and budgets; then replace an audio-only collision cue with synchronized text, shape, and optional sound evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Projectile Lifetime · fault isolation · Debug Projectile Lifetime
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug Asteroids team handles case 6611 during a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate edge-triggered firing on cooldown, lifetime, live-count, reuse, and deterministic projectile ownership; test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases; then cross both screen seams in one update and retain collision and rendering continuity. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: Expire projectiles by world distance or simulation time and remove every group and collision reference exactly once.

content.title: Ordering constraint
content.text: Order work so Pool Reset has a declared contract before execution and a boundary or counterexample after it.

hints: For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Order the regression proof · Debug Pool Reset, name the player, revision, runtime, seed, input, time, coordinate, state, entity, collision, render, cue, accessibility, package, release, and desktop-transfer boundary, Pool Reset precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Order the regression proof · Debug Pool Reset, trace this concrete input and predict event, intent, simulation, collision, cleanup, rendering, cue, accessibility, failure, pause, rollback, recovery, and desktop evidence before reviewing it: A debug Asteroids team handles case 1181 during a low-vision laptop playtest at 125 percent scaling. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate edge-triggered firing on cooldown, lifetime, live-count, reuse, and deterministic projectile ownership; keep every critical cue available through more than color or sound and every action remappable without timing precision; then replay the same input trace at 30, 60, and 144 presentation frames per second and compare simulation state. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: If reuse is justified, reset all position, velocity, age, owner, collision, render, and active fields and prove reconciliation.

For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Order the regression proof · Debug Pool Reset, challenge the documented misconception with changed-frame-rate, stall, seam, input, device, collision, cue, accessibility, save, package, failure, recovery, and controlled desktop-transfer evidence: Object pooling is automatically faster and safe if instances are recycled.

options.text: Declare Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python player outcome, revision, runtime, seed, input trace, accessibility profile, and frame, entity, collision, audio, and memory budgets for the debug Pool Reset case
Predict Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python event, intent, simulation, collision, cleanup, rendering, cue, failure, pause, rollback, and recovery outcomes for the debug Pool Reset case
Run the smallest deterministic Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python simulation model and retain exact intermediate and changed-case results for the debug Pool Reset case

Change one Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python frame rate, stall, seam, device, collision, cue, save, package, or release condition, verify bounded rejection or repair, and state desktop transfer limits for the debug Pool Reset case

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Pool Reset
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: asteroids-pool-reset-1j1gp0" that uses case 3330 to gate edge-triggered firing on cooldown, lifetime, live-count, reuse, and deterministic projectile ownership. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not claim native pygame-ce, SDL, window, controller, mixer, filesystem, package, GPU, installer, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, released pygame-ce 2.5.7, fixed and headless SDL fixtures, real devices, licensed assets, accessibility playtests, profiling, clean installations, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Pool Reset.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Pool Reset into observable performance evidence. For Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Pool Reset, keep Pool Reset connected to executable Python game-state, timing, input, collision, accessibility, test, package, and release decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: asteroids-pool-reset-1j1gp0
# Competency: asteroids-pool-reset.
# Case 3330: a controller-remapping accessibility review.
# Operating constraint: test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases.
# Changed case: cross both screen seams in one update and retain collision and rendering continuity.
def evidence_asteroids_pool_reset_1j1gp0(requested_shots: int = 12, accepted_shots: int = 5, cooldown_ms: int = 180, lifetime_ms: int = 900, live_cap: int = 6, leaked_projectiles: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1j1gp0 = "1j1gp0-0pg1j1-3330"
    assert evidence_variant_1j1gp0
    evidence_axes_1j1gp0 = (
        "player1j1gp0",
        "seed3330",
        "input0pg1j1",
        "frame1j1gp03330",
        "state33301j1gp0",
        "playtest0pg1j13330",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1j1gp0)) == 6
    if requested_shots < 0 or accepted_shots < 0 or cooldown_ms < 1:
        return False, accepted_shots, "projectile-domain"
    if accepted_shots > requested_shots or accepted_shots > live_cap:
        return False, accepted_shots, "fire-budget"
    if lifetime_ms <= cooldown_ms:
        return False, lifetime_ms, "lifetime-policy"
    if leaked_projectiles > 0:
        return False, leaked_projectiles, "ownership-leak"
    assert accepted_shots <= live_cap
    return True, accepted_shots, "bounded-projectiles"

steps.title: Asteroids, pygame-ce, and Python Publish the incident record · Debug Pool Reset
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Pool Reset: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A debug Asteroids team handles case 6943 during a headless continuous-integration replay. Build deterministic Python evidence to gate edge-triggered firing on cooldown, lifetime, live-count, reuse, and deterministic projectile ownership; test empty, zero-vector, seam, low-frame-rate, focus-loss, device-loss, missing-asset, corrupted-save, and rejected cases; then lose window focus while thrust and fire are held, then prove both actions release safely. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real pygame-ce, SDL, windows, controllers, audio devices, assets, files, installers, frame timing, GPUs, packaging, and production behavior require explicit controlled desktop transfer gates. Competency probe: If reuse is justified, reset all position, velocity, age, owner, collision, render, and active fields and prove reconciliation.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: If reuse is justified, reset all position, velocity, age, owner, collision, render, and active fields and prove reconciliation.
